title: Multiplex Portuguese Families as a Lens into rare mutations and the Shared Genetic Architecture of Schizophrenia, Mood Disorders, and Autism Spectrum Disorders.
abstract: WGS of multiplex Portuguese families shows cross-diagnostic co-segregation (28% psychotic+mood; 7% ID/ASD+SZ/mood) and identifies a rare predicted damaging variant in a single neurodevelopmental gene that spans multiple severe mental illness phenotypes.
